subcodes.first_line: O Lord and Master! This is a servant whom Thou hast chosen from among Thy servants and singled out from among Thy bondsmen and made him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب و مولای ان هذا عبد اصطفیته بین عبادک و اخترته من بین ارقائک و جعلته
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
